data.title: Modiv Industrial To Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results on March 25, 2026 & Declares Quarterly Dividends for Preferred Shareholders and Monthly Distributions for Common Shareholders
data.description: Denver - Modiv Industrial, Inc. (NYSE: MDV), a public REIT specializing in industrial manufacturing real estate, disclosed it will release its financial results for the quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025, after the market closes on Wednesday, March 25, 2026. A conference call will be hosted by management at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to review the outcomes, with participation accessible through dialing 1-800-717-1738 or 1-646.

data.title: Cardinal Infrastructure Group Inc. Announces Full Year 2025 Results and Affirms 2026 Guidance
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on March 19, 2026, Cardinal Infrastructure Group Inc. (NASDAQ: CDNL) disclosed its financial performance for the full year 2025 and maintained its projections for 2026. The key highlights for the year 2025 included a revenue of $456.0 million, indicating a 45% increase overall or 33% growth...

data.title: Cécred Launches New Styling Collection, Where Healthy Hair Meets High-Performance Styling
data.description: Cécred has unveiled its new Styling Collection, adding to their acclaimed haircare range. The collection includes six innovative stylers and one high-performance tool, aiming to create stylish looks while maintaining hair health. This launch comes as part of Cécred's efforts to expand their product offerings. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on March 19, 2026.

data.title: "People Don't Believe Me When I Tell Them My Actual Age" ActivatedYou Essential Skin Food Reviews Highlight Very Positive Experiences Support for Smoother, Firmer Skin
data.description: Users are thrilled with ActivatedYou® Essential Skin Food™ for its ability to support natural collagen production, enhance skin texture, and promote a radiant appearance at any age. The product has received widespread praise among consumers seeking to improve the health and youthfulness of their skin. Released on March 19, 2026 in Los Angeles, this skin food has garnered significant attention for its promising results.

data.title: BIOQuébec BUDGET 2026–2027: Key Directions on Innovation and Life Sciences and Health Technologies Maintained
data.description: In LAVAL, Quebec, BIOQuébec, the association for life sciences and health technologies (LSHT) sector, acknowledges the government's cautious approach in supporting these industries. The 2026-2027 budget aligns with Quebec's Life Sciences Strategy and Research and Innovation Investment Strategy, emphasizing the importance of these sectors for Quebec's economic growth. The association praises the government for maintaining focus on the LSHT industry, highlighting its strategic significance.

data.title: Kolibri Global Energy Announces Year End Results With a 15% Increase in Production to Over 4,013 BOEPD
data.description: In 2025, Thousand Oaks recorded an average production of 4,013 barrels of oil equivalent per day (BOEPD), marking a 15% rise from the 2024 production volume of 3,478 BOEPD. This increase can be attributed to the successful drilling and completion of new wells during the year. Despite the production boost, net revenues for 2025 totaled $56.9 million, showing a 3% decline from the previous year. data.title: Lumito and Tethis complete proof-of-concept study demonstrating compatibility between Lumito's UCNP imaging and Tethis' SmartBioSurface® slides
data.description: Lumito AB and Tethis S.p.A. have revealed the successful conclusion of an initial proof-of-concept evaluation confirming the technical compatibility of Lumito's UCNP-based labelling and imaging technology with Tethis'. This collaboration marks a significant milestone in the partnership, highlighting the potential for future joint projects between the two companies. The study, conducted in Lund, Sweden and Milan, featured a detailed assessment of the innovative technology, indicating promising results. This development showcases the commitment of Lumito and Tethis to advancing research and fostering innovation in the field.

data.title: Belief BioMed announced BBM-H901 (Dalnacogene Ponparvovec Injection), China's first hemophilia B gene therapy, was officially approved in Macao, China
data.description: On March 19, 2026, Belief BioMed (BBM) revealed the approval of BBM-H901, also known as Dalnacogene Ponparvovec Injection, by the Pharmaceutical Administration Bureau of Macao Special Administrative Region of China. This injection has been given the green light for treating (restate purpose without mentioning the specific condition).

data.title: Viettel Ranks No.1 Globally in Telecom Brand Strength
data.description: In HANOI, Vietnam, on March 19, 2026, the Viettel Group was recognized as the leading telecom brand globally, attaining a Brand Strength Index (BSI) score of 89.9 out of 100 and an AAA+ rating from Brand Finance. This award distinguishes Viettel Group as the strongest telecom brand worldwide, signifying a remarkable achievement in the industry.

data.title: INSTEM Announces Extension of Research Collaboration Agreement with U.S. FDA to 2031
data.description: Instem, a company based in Boston and Staffordshire, England, has recently revealed that they have extended their Research Collaboration Agreement (RCA) with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for an additional 5 years. This partnership renewal signifies the ongoing commitment between Instem and the FDA in their joint efforts towards furthering research and development initiatives.

data.title: WELL Health Reports Record FY2025 Results; Canadian Patient Services Adjusted EBITDA Up 43% with Record Free Cash Flow
data.description: WELL Health Technologies Corp, a digital healthcare company trading on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbols WELL and on the OTCQX as WHTCF, has released its audited annual financial statements for the fiscal year and fourth quarter closing on December 31, 2025. The company aims at enhancing health outcomes worldwide through technology-driven solutions for healthcare practitioners and patients. The announcement includes the submission of management’s discussion and analysis report alongside the financial statements.

data.title: Nextdoor Promotes Tony Castellanos to Executive Vice President, People as AI-Driven People Strategy Becomes Core to Business Growth
data.description: Nextdoor Holdings, Inc. revealed Tony Castellanos' promotion to Executive Vice President, People. Castellanos, now overseeing Nextdoor's People organization, will manage talent acquisition, compensation, HR business partnering, and benefits, supporting the company's focus on enhancing AI-driven People operations and expanding its workforce strategy. Having progressed within the company, Castellanos' new role comes as Nextdoor solidifies its commitment to advancing its People operations.
